title: Smoky Vanilla Greek Yogurt Mousse
description: A refreshing dessert combining smoky flavors with the creaminess of vanilla Greek yogurt mousse.
instructions: In a blender or food processor, combine Greek yogurt, smoky honey, vanilla extract, and granulated sugar. Blend until smooth.
Add lemon zest and blend until well combined.
In a separate bowl, whip heavy cream until stiff peaks form.
Fold the whipped cream into the yogurt mixture until no white streaks remain.
Spoon the mousse into individual serving cups or a large serving dish.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours or until set.
Serve chilled and garnish with additional lemon zest, if desired.
